_comment: NemoClaw / OpenClaw agent runtime config. MCP server catalog: config/mcp_servers.json. Model ports: config/models.yml. Env vars substituted from .env by scripts/07_nemoclaw.sh.

list._comment: Main orchestrator — uses Brain for deep planning, spawns Nano sub-agents for parallel execution
list.name: main

list._comment: Fast responder — Nano only, for quick Telegram/Slack replies that don't need deep reasoning
list.name: fast

list._comment: Coding agent — Brain orchestrates, Nano applies diffs via aider MCP tool
list.name: coder

telegram._comment: Get bot token from @BotFather. Get your numeric user ID from @userinfobot.
telegram._usage: Send text, voice notes (auto-transcribed via ASR), or images (vision via Brain). Prefix with /deep for Brain-level reasoning.

slack._comment: Create Slack app at api.slack.com — requires bot token (xoxb-) and app-level token (xapp-).
slack._usage: Mention @spark or DM it. Use /deep prefix to invoke the Brain. Images and screenshots interpreted via vision.

mcpServers._comment: Active profile: developer. See config/mcp_servers.json for full catalog and profiles (minimal/developer/saas_builder/full).

shell._comment: Allows agent to run bash commands on Spark. Required for autonomous DevOps tasks.

postgres._comment: Agent can introspect its own memory DB or query your app DBs.

puppeteer._comment: Headless browser — web automation, screenshots, form filling, scraping.
